name: Red Star Over America
short_description: Red Star Over America is a political simulation game that establishes a proletarian political party in the United States, expands propaganda through various means, fights against bourgeois parties, and ultimately achieves victory!
detailed_description:
Red Star Over America is a political simulation game that establishes a proletarian political party in the United States, expands propaganda through various means, fights against bourgeois parties, and ultimately achieves victory!

The game is set in 1992, when the world enters another timeline. At this time, the Soviet Union still exists, the international communist movement is underway, and bourgeois countries are facing an unprecedented crisis. Where will the United States go?

Game features

1. Establish a proletarian political party and engage in competition with bourgeois political parties.

2. Observe the development trend of political parties and make decisions at appropriate times to win public support.

supported_languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
